docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED NOV-12-2021, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GUILLEN-KRONER, VINCENT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL AS TO DEFENDANT GUILLEN-KRONER, VINCENT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-19-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL AS TO DEFENDANT GUILLEN-KRONER, VINCENT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-06-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-21-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY VINCENT GUILLEN-KRONER. DEFENDANT VINCENT GUILLEN-KRONER IS NOT PRESENT. THE COURT FINDS THE CLAIM IS WITHIN THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. ****NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES**** NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) DANIEL SHINER, ACCOUNT RECEIVABLE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-19-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-06-2022 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL, REPRESENTED BY DANIEL SHINER, ACCOUNTS RECEIVEABLE, IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT VINCENT GUILLEN-KRONER. COURT DETERMINES THAT THE SIGNATURE ON THE RETURN CERTIFIED MAIL CARD IS NOT VALID. PLAINTIFF MUST RESERVE HIS COMPLAINT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF SINAI MEMORIAL CHAPEL IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DANIEL SHINER, ACCOUNT RECEIVABLE. DEFENDANT VINCENT GUILLEN-KRONER IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. COURT ORDERED ON APR-06-2022 *** NO FURTHER CONTINUANCES ***. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: RONALD QUIDACHAY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
